metadata.title: SNAP FY 2026 Maximum Allotments and Deductions

body: Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) Fiscal Year (FY) 2026 Maximum Allotments and Deductions The following tables provide the monthly maximum allotment and allowable deductions for FY 2026 (effective October 1, 2025, through September 30, 2026).
